verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a sperm-specific, gamete adhesion factor essential for sperm-egg fusion. It is a single-pass transmembrane protein with an extracellular immunoglobulin-like domain. While constitutively surface-expressed on sperm, its relevance to therapeutic targeting is strictly limited to the germ cell compartment and meiotic/fertilization biology. Surface accessibility is genuine but contextual to specialized gamete cell type and fertilization biology.
